body.focus:
def build_tree(arr, i=0):
        if i >= len(arr) or arr[i] is None:
            return None
        node = TreeNode(arr[i])
        node.left = build_tree(arr, 2 * i + 1)
        node.right = build_tree(arr, 2 * i + 2)
        return node
